name: Greek Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (14 1/2-ounce) diced tomatoes with basil, garlic, and oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant and tender.
3. Add the diced tomatoes with basil, oregano, green onions, parsley, and lemon juice.
4. Stir to combine and simmer for 2 minutes or until heated through.
5. In a large bowl, mix together the tomato sauce mixture, cooked spaghetti, crumbled feta cheese, and sliced olives (if using).
6. Toss until well combined.
7. Serve immediately and garnish with lemon slices, additional green onions, fresh parsley, and olive sprigs if desired.
